title: WATCH: Guatemala volcano's eruption sends hikers in restricted area running for their lives

title: WATCH: Hikers flee erupting volcano
description: A group of tourists in Guatemala was forced to run down Santiaguito, an active volcano nicknamed “the Death Trail,” after it suddenly erupted, sending ash and debris falling around them.
